---
title: "Empirical Research in Accounting & Finance"
date: "July 09, 2024" 
jupyter: python3
description: "Free Books for Empirical Research in Accounting & Finance"
---

Some Good Books to Learn Research Methodologies in Accounting & Finance - 

01. [Empirical Research in Accounting: Tools and Methods](https://iangow.github.io/far_book/)

02. [Empirical Research in Accounting: Tools and Methods - Python Polars Edition](https://iangow.github.io/era_pl_book/)

03. [Tidy Finance with R](https://www.tidy-finance.org/r/)

04. [Tidy Finance with Python](https://www.tidy-finance.org/python/)

05. [The Effect: An Introduction to Research Design and Causality](https://theeffectbook.net/index.html)
